title: eugenia alpina
intro: Eugenia alpina, also known as the Strawberry Guava, is a tropical fruit-bearing shrub native to the Andes mountains in South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Eugenia alpina include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties that help protect against cell damage. Eugenia alpina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
